description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house featuring a flat roof and a combination of white and orange-brown exterior finishes. The structure includes large glass windows arranged in both vertical strips and horizontal bands, providing ample natural light. A spacious outdoor area with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and palm trees is visible, suggesting a luxurious and open lifestyle. The house has a rooftop terrace with outdoor seating and a carport with two parked vehicles. Landscaping includes a mix of trees and shrubs, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, a rooftop terrace, and a poolside outdoor area, finished in white and orange-brown tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rooftop terrace, carport with two cars, and a tree-lined driveway.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the pool, sun loungers, palm trees, and the open outdoor living space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the pool, palm trees, and the back facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entryway, carport, and a mix of trees and shrubs near the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide glass door, adjacent carport, and minimalistic landscaping
